title: BJP Shares Arvind Kejriwal's Sheesh Mahal 2.0 Images With 'Rehman Dakait' Jibe, AAP Issues Rebuttal
description: BJP took a jibe at former Delhi Chief Minister and AAP convenor Arvind Kejriwal, calling his new type-VII government bungalow a "Sheesh Mahal part two." Singh accused Kejriwal of betraying the people of Delhi by opting for luxuries in his bungalow.
